description.ko: 격렬한 신호 단층 속에서도 각진 파편들이 완벽한 균형을 이루는 흑백 글리치 지도.
description.en: A monochrome glitch atlas where angular fragments hold perfect balance inside a violent signal fracture.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Signal Fault Atlas": a black and white geometric glitch abstraction seen like an impossible topographic circuit map, built from interlocking #1A1A1A angular corridors, #FFFFFF negative-space fractures, and layered #808080 / #C0C0C0 calibration grids. A violent diagonal signal fault tears across the composition, offsetting entire bands of triangles, trapezoids, and serrated chevrons as if the image were being refreshed too fast. Dense horizontal scanlines, bit-plane shearing, hard-edged compression blocks, broken barcode rhythms, and medium-density square particle debris create monochrome complexity without color. The balance is precise but tense: every fragment feels locked to an invisible mathematical grid while the surface flickers with fast, intense digital motion, sharp angles, high contrast, crisp vector edges, and cold abstract depth.
